option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Plantastic">
<meta-data android:name="perenual_api_key" android:value="${perenual_api_key}" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Plantastic">
<meta-data android:name="perenual_api_key" android:value="${perenual_api_key}" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<receiver android:name=".notifications.SnoozeNotificationReceiver" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="com.example.plantastic.SNOOZE_NOTIFICATION" /> </intent-filter> </receiver>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Заголовок экрана --> <TextView android:id="@+id/titleText" style="@style/ScreenHeader" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="Entsüklopeedia" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Поле поиска: под заголовком --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.SearchView android:id="@+id/searchView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg" app:iconifiedByDefault="false" app:queryHint="taime otsing..." app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/titleText" />
<!-- Список растений: под полем поиска до самого низа экрана --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/plantsRecyclerView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:padding="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/searchView" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Заголовок экрана --> <TextView android:id="@+id/titleText" style="@style/ScreenHeader" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="Entsüklopeedia" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Поле поиска: под заголовком --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.SearchView android:id="@+id/searchView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg" app:iconifiedByDefault="false" app:queryHint="taime otsing..." app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/titleText" />
<!-- Loading Indicator --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressBar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Список растений: под полем поиска до самого низа экрана --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/plantsRecyclerView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:padding="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/searchView" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<TextView android:id="@+id/titleText" style="@style/ScreenHeader" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/tere" android:textSize="48sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.5" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/bgcolor">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/titleText" style="@style/ScreenHeader" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tere" android:textSize="32sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Today Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/sectionToday" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:visibility="gone"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Täna" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" /> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/containerToday" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Next 3 Days Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/sectionNext3Days" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:visibility="gone"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Järgmised 3 päeva" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" /> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/containerNext3Days" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Next 7 Days Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/sectionNext7Days" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:visibility="gone"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Sel nädalal" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" /> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/containerNext7Days" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- No upcoming care message --> <TextView android:id="@+id/emptyText" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Teie taimed on hoolitsetud!" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/black" android:gravity="center" android:padding="24dp" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/bgcolor" android:fillViewport="true" android:overScrollMode="always">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@null" android:contentDescription="Back" android:padding="0dp" android:src="@drawable/weui_arrow_filled__1_" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:text="Minu taim" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Plant Picture --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/btnTakePhoto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minHeight="200dp" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/selectedPlantImage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:scaleType="fitCenter" android:contentDescription="@string/selected_plant_image" /> </FrameLayout>
<!-- Nickname field --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/nickname_label" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editNickname" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:inputType="textPersonName" android:hint="@string/enter_nickname" android:autofillHints="username" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:enabled="false" android:focusable="false" android:cursorVisible="false" />
<!-- Type field --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/type_label" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editSpecies" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:inputType="text" android:hint="@string/enter_species" android:autofillHints="off" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:enabled="false" android:focusable="false" android:cursorVisible="false" />
<!-- Description field --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/description_label" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editDescription" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="140dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="top|start" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:hint="@string/enter_description" android:autofillHints="off" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:enabled="false" android:focusable="false" android:cursorVisible="false" />
<!-- Horizontal container for control buttons --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" style="?android:attr/buttonBarStyle">
<!-- Water button (kasta) --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnWater" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/btncolor" android:textColor="@color/white" android:text="Kasta" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="20sp" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" app:cornerRadius="12dp" android:minHeight="48dp" android:minWidth="48dp" />
<!-- Edit button (muuta) --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnEdit" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/btncolor" android:text="Muuta" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="20sp" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" app:cornerRadius="12dp" android:minHeight="48dp" android:minWidth="48dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:padding="12dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:text="Hooldusajalugu" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TableLayout android:id="@+id/tableCareHistory" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:stretchColumns="1">
<TableRow android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/btncolor" android:padding="8dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Tüüp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Kuupäev" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" /> </TableRow> </TableLayout> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/bgcolor" android:fillViewport="true" android:overScrollMode="always">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@null" android:contentDescription="Back" android:padding="0dp" android:src="@drawable/weui_arrow_filled__1_" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:text="Minu taim" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Plant Picture --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/btnTakePhoto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minHeight="200dp" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/selectedPlantImage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:scaleType="fitCenter" android:contentDescription="@string/selected_plant_image" /> </FrameLayout>
<!-- Nickname field --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/nickname_label" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editNickname" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:inputType="textPersonName" android:hint="@string/enter_nickname" android:autofillHints="username" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:enabled="false" android:focusable="false" android:cursorVisible="false" />
<!-- Type field --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/type_label" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editSpecies" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:inputType="text" android:hint="@string/enter_species" android:autofillHints="off" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:enabled="false" android:focusable="false" android:cursorVisible="false" />
<!-- Description field --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/description_label" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/editDescription" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="140dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="top|start" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:hint="@string/enter_description" android:autofillHints="off" android:textColor="@color/black" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:enabled="false" android:focusable="false" android:cursorVisible="false" />
<!-- Horizontal container for control buttons --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" style="?android:attr/buttonBarStyle">
<!-- Water button (kasta) --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnWater" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/btncolor" android:textColor="@color/white" android:text="Kasta" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="20sp" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" app:cornerRadius="12dp" android:minHeight="48dp" android:minWidth="48dp" />
<!-- Edit button (muuta) --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnEdit" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/btncolor" android:text="Muuta" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="20sp" style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle" app:cornerRadius="12dp" android:minHeight="48dp" android:minWidth="48dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:padding="12dp" android:background="@drawable/search_view_bg">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:text="Hooldusajalugu" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TableLayout android:id="@+id/tableCareHistory" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:stretchColumns="1">
<TableRow android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/btncolor" android:padding="8dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Tüüp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Kuupäev" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Aeg" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" /> </TableRow> </TableLayout> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
